name: hk_1_5
requirements: As part of your analysis, over 2025-06-15 compute and store: mean_pm25_tungchung, mean_aqhi_tungchung (station 6), mean_pm25_tapmun, mean_aqhi_tapmun (station 8) (float).

turns.query: Compare air quality between Islands District monitoring at Tung Chung (station_id: 6) and Tap Mun (station_id: 8) versus urban Hong Kong Island stations on 2025-06-15
